auth_access_code_invalid: The code is not valid. Make sure your 2FA was set up correctly.
balance_expense_distribution_invalid_sum: Distribution amounts must add up to exactly 100%

match.countPlural=one: There is one item on the list.
match.countPlural=other: There are {count} items on the list.

schedule_next_date_info: If you leave next due date empty, it will be set automatically based on the chosen weekday.
settings_categories_delete_invalid: Cannot delete a category that has items (including deactivated ones)
settings_categories_delete_items: Select items to delete. Doing so will also delete the purchase history of those items.
settings_categories_empty: This category has no items yet
settings_items_action_empty: Please select at least one item
settings_items_change_category: Select a category to move all selected items to it:
settings_items_delete_info: You are about to delete the selected items, including their purchase history. It might be better to deactivate the item or move it to another category instead. Are you sure you want to delete it?
settings_items_other_actions: Or select another action to apply to selected items:
settings_users_no_active_user: You are not logged in. Please select a user.
settings_users_username_invalid: Invalid name. Must have a length of {min} to {max} and contain no special characters.
shopping_add_items_explanation:
Write one type of item per line.
You may optionally add an amount before the item.
For example:
3x Tomatoes
Chocolate
2x Milk
shopping_add_items_parse_error: Some lines could not be parsed. Please check for mistakes.
shopping_add_items_suggestions: These popular items haven't been bought in a while. You can add them by pressing the button:
shopping_categorize_select_category: Set the category for your selected items:
shopping_categorize_select_items: Select items that you want to categorize together:
shopping_categorize_select_items_invalid: Please select at least one item to categorize
shopping_purchase_finished: Purchase recorded. You may now add an expense which will be linked to that purchase.
shopping_validate_all_items: For reference, these are the items you wrote down in the last step:
shopping_validate_explanation: You've entered names that are very similar to existing items. Chorehub will automatically 'fix' that for you by using the existing items. If you don't want this, please untick the corresponding checkboxes.
